description: Representative probes for non-integrating AP/A-level/formulary hooks.

probes.refusal_without_extra_declarations: The exponential law is not a static Hessian.
probes.lesson: The failure points to an evidence/Fisher attachment schema, not to a static hidden-load card.

probes.refusal_without_extra_declarations: The absorbance equation is a sensor law, not a storage Hessian.
probes.declared_object_after_extra_declarations: scalar measurement Fisher precision for concentration
probes.lesson: Sensor laws can become module-facing evidence only after a noise model and estimated parameter are declared.

probes.refusal_without_extra_declarations: The decay law is a stochastic counting process, not a static quadratic storage object.
probes.declared_object_after_extra_declarations: scalar Poisson Fisher precision for lambda
probes.lesson: This is a strong evidence hook; the missing object is likelihood structure, not more formula digestion.

probes.surface_formula: string harmonic frequencies and wave speed
probes.refusal_without_extra_declarations: The wave formula is not finite until boundary conditions, basis, and truncation are declared.
probes.declared_object_after_extra_declarations: finite diagonal modal stiffness family with mass metric
probes.lesson: The obstruction is infinite/basis-free description; a finite mode declaration converts it into a clean quadratic family.

probes.refusal_without_extra_declarations: The raw inverse-square potential is not globally positive quadratic; local radial curvature has the wrong sign in this simple coordinate.
probes.declared_object_after_extra_declarations: positive local radial Hessian of an effective potential at a stable circular orbit
probes.lesson: The failure is informative: local field attachment depends on stability and effective-potential declarations.

probes.refusal_without_extra_declarations: The equation of state alone is not a module object.
probes.declared_object_after_extra_declarations: local scalar Hessian d2F/dV2 in declared isothermal Helmholtz model
probes.lesson: Thermodynamic formulas attach only after ensemble and potential are declared; the refusal remains correct.

probes.refusal_without_extra_declarations: Voltage is measurable, but reaction coordinate and thermodynamic convention are missing.
probes.declared_object_after_extra_declarations: scalar voltage-measurement Fisher precision for log Q
probes.lesson: Electrochemistry is a strong bridge, but it should enter through a declared thermodynamic/evidence schema.

probes.refusal_without_extra_declarations: The current static kernel calls require SPD objects; this metric is indefinite.
probes.declared_object_after_extra_declarations: none in v0 static attachment runner
probes.lesson: This is a real boundary for the current SPD route, not merely missing units.
